items.topic: Disappearance Or Change Of Paid Software

evidence_quotes.quote: media and software we pay for, disappear and change

paragraphs.text: I believe this is a crucial step towards fair consumer rights in the digital age, more and more we see media and software we pay for, disappear and change (often for the worse) at the whims of big corporations and their investors, with little to no recourse for the actual users of the aforementioned products. It doesn't only affect our leisure activities, but also crucial tools for certain jobs, software that is invaluable for 3D modellers, graphic designers, software engineers, and much, much more are at stake and at the complete mercy of a company's bottom line.
